description: Dynamic bridge — 2026-04-28 (Tuesday) session / Week of Apr 28 - May 2

market_regime.label: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_CEASEFIRE_FRAGILE_EXPIRY_DAY
market_regime.key_risk: Brent $101.93 — eased from $108 intraday high Apr 27 on Iran new proposal. US unlikely to accept (CNN). Monthly F&O expiry April 28. FII 6th consecutive selling day (-₹1,100 Cr). DII strong support (₹4,124 Cr Apr 27). Ceasefire extended by Trump but Hormuz still closed.
market_regime.dominant_risk: (1) FII flow direction Apr 28 — was Apr 27 the start of FII covering or just intra-week reduction in selling pressure? (2) Israel-Iran latent binary — Hormuz blockade and stalled talks mean any single fresh headline can re-spike Brent >$105 and trigger ESCALATION_REVERSAL scenario. (3) IT sector cascade not yet decisively done — WIPRO Q4 due Apr 30, possible pre-announcement risk this week.
market_regime.crude_note: Brent $101.93 April 28 — stable in $100-103 zone. Iran submitted new proposal Apr 27 evening; eased from $108 high. US unlikely to accept current terms (nuclear program). Hormuz blockade continues.
market_regime.flow_note: Apr 27: FII net -₹1,151.48 Cr (5th consecutive selling day). DII net +₹4,123.92 Cr (very strong domestic support). Apr 28: FII selling 6th day, estimated ₹1,100 Cr net sell (intraday at 11am).
market_regime.regime_shift_note: BankNifty reclaimed 56,000 (Apr 24 broke; Apr 27 close 56,264.30). Day-1 bounce printed cleanly per CONTINUATION_BOUNCE base case. Israel-Iran weekend binary did not trigger escalation. P031 (NIFTY 24,050-24,300 by May 1) now IN_RANGE after Apr 27 bounce — needs to hold/extend through May 1.

Brent cooled to $101.03 — held in $100-105 elevated zone; no fresh Israel-Iran escalation Monday session
BankNifty reclaimed 56,000 (close 56,264.30) — P032 trajectory toward 56,500 by May 1 better positioned but still ~250 pts away
HDFC Bank Q4 already digested (NIM compression yellow flag); P028 HCLTECH check tomorrow EXPECTED RIGHT (₹1,203 vs <₹1,430 target)

opening_bias.rationale_note: Confidence 3/5: solid base case for digestion/mild positive open after day-1 bounce, but day-2-of-bounce historically shows fade tendency 35-40% of time. Latent Israel-Iran weekend binary still unresolved.

session_direction.key_assumption: Monthly F&O expiry (April 28) creates two-way chop but net tendency toward short-covering into close. Nifty already showing resilience — opened gap-down to ~24,040 but reclaimed 24,170 by 11am IST. DII very strong support (₹4,124 Cr Apr 27). Brent stable at 01-102 — not escalating. Iran submitted new proposal (cautious de-escalation optimism) though US unlikely to accept in current form. FII 6th day selling but marginal (₹1,100 Cr) vs DII firepower. Resistance at 24,220-24,320 (50-DMA zone). P028 HCLTECH expected RIGHT — HCLTECH ~₹1,226 well below ₹1,430 ceiling. Monthly expiry caps extreme moves but net bias tilts mildly bullish given gap-down open already absorbed by 11am. Base case: close 24,100-24,280.
session_direction.brent_forecast: $100-104 — base case Brent consolidates in this band. Iran proposal creates modest downside pressure on crude. Break below $98 on Hormuz reopening signal = structural shift; spike above $106 on proposal rejection = afternoon risk-off.

scenarios.name: EXPIRY_SHORT_COVER (35%)
scenarios.description: Monthly expiry short-covering drives afternoon rally. Nifty holds 24,100+ floor; breaks 24,200. Brent stays $100-103. DII continues buying. Closes 24,200-24,280.

scenarios.name: EXPIRY_DIGESTION (35%)
scenarios.description: Choppy expiry session — morning gains fade as FII selling continues. Nifty oscillates 24,050-24,170. Closes near previous close +/- 0.1%. Range-bound day.

scenarios.name: INTRADAY_FADE (20%)
scenarios.description: Iran proposal rejected harshly by Trump mid-session. Brent ticks up to $103-105. FII selling accelerates. Nifty fades to close 23,950-24,050.

scenarios.name: ESCALATION_REVERSAL (10%)
scenarios.description: US rejects Iran proposal + fresh military headline. Brent spikes above $106. Defense bid, banking/IT smashed. Nifty reverses hard below 24,000.

ceasefire_binary_matrix.note: Stalemate probability raised 20→30 after weekend passed without escalation strike AND without any deal restart. Brent cooled to $101.03 despite stalled talks suggests market pricing in narrow stalemate path. Collapse probability nudged 45→40 (fewer fresh negative catalysts overnight); extension 35→30 (talks halted by Trump, no restart in sight).

stocks_to_watch: HCLTECH: P028 SCORE DAY (Apr 28) — close vs <₹1,430. Friday close ₹1,203.20; if Apr 27 bounce extended into IT, watch ₹1,210-1,250 zone. EXPECTED RIGHT — ₹227+ buffer to ceiling.

HDFC Bank / BankNifty: BankNifty 56,264 (+0.31% Apr 27) — needs +236 to reclaim 56,500 for P032. Watch banking absorption of HDFC NIM-compression news. Q4 cascade continues (Axis Bank possible Apr 29).

ASTRA MICRO: ₹1,123.75 last (Apr 24). Monday session impact TBD — if defense rotated out as Brent cooled, watch for support at ₹1,080-1,100. P030 ABOVE_RANGE forecast still tracking; M012 v5 floor ₹1,050.
COCHINSHIP: ₹1,638 last (Apr 24). P033 target ₹1,720-1,800 by May 1 — needs +5-10% in 3 sessions. Without weekend escalation, defense premium may ease — P033 trajectory at risk if no fresh catalyst.
INFOSYS: ~₹1,154 last (Apr 24). Q4 cascade priced in. Apr 27 IT sector stabilization signal — watch for follow-through buying.
IRFC: ₹103.36 (Apr 24). P010 SCORE Apr 29 vs ₹85-95 target. EXPECTED WRONG — no re-rating catalyst.
MRPL: ₹186.38 (Apr 24). Brent $101 zone supports OMC margin recovery. P035 (₹190-200 by May 25) tracking; P017 (200-210 by May 8) more aggressive timeline.
SETFGOLD: ₹127.73 (Apr 24). Haven bid on stalemate; if Brent stays $99-103 = consolidation in P034 range ₹125-130.
NIFTY 24,200 RESISTANCE: Day-2 bounce test — break above clears P031 trajectory; failure = consolidation/INTRADAY_FADE scenario.
BANKNIFTY 56,500 LEVEL: Reclaim = P032 trajectory locked; failure to clear = P038 (fails 57,000 by May 5) more probable.
prompt_for_morning_brief: MORNING BRIEF 2026-04-28 (Tuesday): (1) SCORE OPENING BIAS — forecast FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_UP (+0.10%, GIFT est ~24,115). Compare against actual NSE open vs prev close 24,092.7. (2) CRITICAL: P028 HCLTECH SCORE DAY — Apr 28 close vs <₹1,430 ceiling (currently ₹1,203.20). Confirm RIGHT outcome. Look for any HDFC Bank Q4-aftermath cleanup or Axis Bank pre-announcement. (3) Overnight check: Israel-Iran headlines, Brent overnight (key threshold $103 ceiling / $98 floor), GIFT Nifty 06:00 IST, FII/DII flow Apr 27 print. (4) Apr 27 SESSION RESULT (CORRECT): forecast BULLISH +0.5% range 23,900-24,200; actual close 24,092.7 +0.81% (mid-range). Base case CONTINUATION_BOUNCE (50%) materialized cleanly. (5) Day-2 of bounce assessment — was the gap consolidation or fade? (6) BankNifty 56,500 reclaim watch (currently 56,264, needs +236) → P032 trajectory check. (7) Regime tag: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_BOUNCE_DAY2_DIGESTION — update based on actual open + Brent overnight.

opening_bias_actual.gift_nifty_note: GIFT Nifty pre-open April 28 at 24,042 — discount of 74 pts to Nifty futures previous close. Forecast was GIFT est 24,115 (+0.10% gap up). Actual GIFT showed -0.21% gap down signal.
opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Forecast FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_UP (+0.10%, GIFT est 24,115). Actual GIFT pre-open 24,042 — indicated slight gap DOWN of ~0.22%. NSE open estimated at ~24,040 (-0.22% from 24,092.7). Direction WRONG (forecast up, actual down). Contributing factors: Iran submitted new proposal overnight (cautious optimism vs EOD stalemate thesis), but Brent remaining elevated at 01-102 capped upside. Nifty opened cautiously on monthly expiry day. Market subsequently recovered — by 11am IST trading at 24,170 (+0.33% from prev close), showing intraday resilience despite gap-down open.

overnight_delta_vs_forecast.iran_ceasefire_status: CEASEFIRE EXTENDED INDEFINITELY by Trump (April 21). Iran submitted new proposal to US (April 27 evening) — US unlikely to accept per CNN sources. Talks mediated by Pakistan; stalled on Hormuz-nuclear program disagreement.
overnight_delta_vs_forecast.hormuz_status: Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed. Iran demands US lift blockade first. Dual blockade continues.
overnight_delta_vs_forecast.brent_note: Brent ~01-102 on April 28 (eased from 08 intraday high on April 27 after Iran proposal news). April 27 closed ~01.03. April 28 trading around 01.93.
overnight_delta_vs_forecast.net_effect: Despite 5th consecutive FII selling day (net -₹1,151 Cr Apr 27), DII bought ₹4,124 Cr providing strong floor. Monthly expiry day creating volatility. Nifty opened cautiously but bounced.

session_direction_accuracy_today.direction_note: Forecast BEARISH_VOLATILE (morning-brief revision, -0.6%, range 23,900-24,220). Actual: Nifty closed 23,897.95 (-1.14% from 24,173.05). Direction CORRECT (bearish confirmed). Close 23,897.95 is 2 pts BELOW range low (23,900) — essentially AT the forecast range edge. Magnitude ~1.9x stronger than -0.6% base case; actual fell into the ESCALATION_SPIRAL scenario range (23,850-23,950, 15% prob). NOTE: Escalation scenario trigger (Brent >$110) did NOT fire — Brent actually cooled -4.15% intraday to $100.71. Driver was IT sector cascade (INFY -6.93%, HCLTECH -4.02% follow-through) + weekend risk-off positioning, not geopolitical re-escalation.
session_direction_accuracy_today.range_note: Close 23,897.95 vs forecast range 23,900-24,220. 2.05 pts below range low — ESSENTIALLY AT edge. Counts as marginal range breach (within 0.01%).
session_direction_accuracy_today.magnitude_note: Forecast -0.6% base, scenarios spanned -0.3% to -1.3%. Actual -1.14% falls in escalation-spiral scenario but exceeded base case by ~0.54pts.
session_direction_accuracy_today.brent_note: Forecast Brent $103-108 sustained. Actual $100.71 (-4.15% intraday). Brent forecast WRONG on direction — cooled rather than stayed elevated. Yet Nifty still sold off — key insight: session was dominated by IT sector cascade, not crude macro. FORECAST_PAT007 candidate: idiosyncratic sector drag overrides macro thesis.
session_direction_accuracy_today.scoring_note: Direction CORRECT (bearish). Close marginally below range low (2 pts, 0.01%). Magnitude ~1.9x base case but within scenario envelope. Brent forecast WRONG on direction. Overall PARTIAL_CORRECT — the session-direction call held but macro driver attribution was off.
session_direction_accuracy_today.scenarios_hit: ESCALATION_SPIRAL range (23,850-23,950) — close 23,897.95 sits squarely inside. Scenario was assigned 15% prob; reality triggered via IT cascade rather than Brent spike (different mechanism, same price path).

opening_bias.rationale_note: Confidence 3/5: solid base case for digestion/mild positive open after day-1 bounce, but day-2-of-bounce historically shows fade tendency 35-40% of time. Latent Israel-Iran weekend binary still unresolved.

session_direction.key_assumption: Day-2 of oversold bounce typically consolidates rather than extends — Nifty pauses around 24,100-24,150 to digest Monday gain. Three near-term resistances bunched (24,107 Apr 27 intraday high / 24,150 Apr 27 close cluster / 24,200 forecast cap / 24,300 P031 ceiling) cap upside without fresh catalyst. Floor at 23,950-24,000 (Apr 27 mid-band; psychological 24,000). HDFC Bank NIM compression news already absorbed — BankNifty 56,000 reclaim sustains. session_direction.brent_forecast: $99-103 — base case Brent holds the band as Iran talks halted but no fresh strike. Break <$98 sustained = constructive structural shift; break >$105 on fresh headline = afternoon reversal risk.

scenarios.name: BOUNCE_DIGESTION (45%)
scenarios.description: Mild gap up consolidates between 24,050-24,200. Day-2 sideways action. P028 HCLTECH expected RIGHT outcome. Brent stays $99-103. BankNifty holds 56,000. IT consolidates. Closes 24,080-24,180.

scenarios.name: BOUNCE_CONTINUATION (25%)
scenarios.description: Strong follow-through buying. FII covers part of week net short. BankNifty pushes toward 56,500. Nifty breaks 24,200 and tags 24,300 P031 ceiling. Closes 24,200-24,300.

scenarios.name: INTRADAY_FADE (20%)
scenarios.description: Bounce fades as FII selling resumes. Brent ticks up >$103 mid-session. BankNifty fails to hold 56,200. IT gives back gains. Closes 23,950-24,070 (mild loss to flat).

scenarios.name: ESCALATION_REVERSAL (10%)
scenarios.description: Fresh Iran-Israel headline mid-session or overnight. Brent re-spikes >$105. Defense ripper, banking/IT smashed. Nifty reverses to red close 23,800-23,950.

Weekend BINARY event: Israel strike threats vs Iran + Hormuz shipping disruption still active

Brent closed $100.71 (-4.15% intraday) — cooled but remains in elevated $100-108 zone. Weekend spike to $108+ on any fresh headline = -0.5% to -1.0% gap down; pullback <$95 = flat to mildly positive open

opening_bias_forecast.rationale_note: Confidence 2/5 because weekend binary risk (Israel-Iran escalation) can swing open ±1% in either direction. Base case leans mildly negative on continued FII outflow + below-psychological close. Any ceasefire re-affirmation overnight could flip to gap-up.

opening_bias_actual.gift_nifty_note: GIFT Nifty pre-open Apr 27 ~23,920-23,940 zone (estimated from open). GIFT signaled flat-to-mildly-positive open vs. forecast 23,840 estimate (-0.45% miss to upside).
opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Forecast FLAT_TO_MILD_GAP_DOWN (-0.25%, GIFT est 23,840). Actual gap +0.199% (open 23945.45 vs prev close 23897.95) — GAP_UP direction OPPOSITE of forecast. Override condition partially triggered: Brent cooled below $100 (WTI above $96 = Brent ~$99-100), enabling oversold bounce + DII activation. The override scenario predicted +0.5 to +1.0% gap up but actual was milder +0.20% — markets cautious due to lingering Israel-Iran weekend tensions (Trump halted talks, Iran FM left Pakistan without meeting US). Graded WRONG — direction opposite, magnitude smaller than override scenario. Missed signal: framework correctly mapped override conditions (Brent cooling) but base case underweighted the oversold-bounce probability after 4-day decline (cumulative -2.78%).

overnight_delta_vs_forecast.hormuz_status: Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed; tensions persist but no fresh strike
overnight_delta_vs_forecast.brent_vs_eod: ~-$1 to -$2 vs Apr 25 settle ($105.33). Brent cooled to ~$99-100 zone overnight despite stalled talks — divergence from war-premium thesis.
overnight_delta_vs_forecast.net_effect: Weekend passed without escalation strike. Brent cooled despite stalled talks (positioning unwind / supply expectations). Combined with 4-day oversold conditions, drove modest gap-up open. FORECAST_PAT005 (Diplomatic Restart Trigger) candidate did not fire — talks halted not restarted.

session_direction_forecast.key_assumption: Oversold bounce sustains after 4-day cumulative -2.78% decline. DII support firm at 23,800-23,900 (already tested intraday low 23,936). Brent cooled to $99-100 zone reduces import-cost overhang. IT sector stabilization at lows without fresh negative catalyst (HCLTECH, INFY consolidating). HDFC Bank Q4 already digested (NII +3.2% YoY, NIM 3.38% — modest beat on profit, margin compression a yellow flag for BankNifty). Mid-session short-covering capped at 24,150-24,200 by FII overhang and unresolved Israel-Iran weekend binary still latent. Base case: Nifty closes 24,000-24,150 (+0.4 to +1.0% from open). DII-driven recovery, not structural shift.
session_direction_forecast.brent_forecast: $98-103 — base case Brent holds in this band as Iran talks halted but no fresh strike. Break <$95 sustained 2 sessions = constructive structural shift; break >$105 on fresh headline = afternoon reversal risk.

session_direction_actual.brent_note: Brent cooled $4-5 from Apr 25 settle ($105.33) to $101.03 — held in elevated $100-105 zone, regime-change threshold (<$95 sustained) NOT triggered.
session_direction_actual.session_theme: Oversold bounce day-1 plays out cleanly — DII-driven recovery from 4-day -2.78% decline. BankNifty reclaimed 56,000. Sensex outperformed Nifty (+0.83% vs +0.81%). IT sector stabilization at lows. No fresh Israel-Iran escalation; Brent cooled $4 despite stalled US-Iran talks. Framework v6 forecast vindicated — base-case CONTINUATION_BOUNCE scenario materialized.

session_direction_accuracy.direction_note: Forecast BULLISH (+0.5% from open). Actual: Nifty closed 24,092.7 (+194.75 / +0.81%), open 23,945.45. Direction CORRECT — index closed firmly higher in line with oversold-bounce thesis.
session_direction_accuracy.range_note: Forecast range 23,900-24,200. Actual close 24,092.7 sits squarely in upper half of range (mid-band 24,050). CONTINUATION_BOUNCE base case (50% probability, range 24,000-24,150) materialized almost exactly as scripted.
session_direction_accuracy.magnitude_note: Forecast +0.5% from open; actual +0.62% from open (close 24,092.7 vs open 23,945.45). Magnitude error +0.12pp — within 50% tolerance band. From prev close 23,897.95: +0.81% (close-to-close), still within forecast band.
session_direction_accuracy.brent_note: Forecast $98-103. Actual Brent $101.03 — squarely in band. Sub-$103 ceiling held; afternoon-reversal risk did not trigger.
session_direction_accuracy.scenario_match: CONTINUATION_BOUNCE (50% base case) — DII defended morning low 23,940; short-covering built through morning; IT/Banking stabilized; Brent held $100-101.
